summary.stop_rule: Do not add a public preset registry or .tlmr preset metadata until ordinary held-out diversity, control separation, random-trial baseline, exact-decode, and SEARCH_FRONTIER_GATE format-promotion gates all pass.
summary.conclusion: Public presets are the strongest non-depth mechanism signal, but current controls block promotion.

candidate_profiles.stop_reason: ordinary held-out negative groups are zero

gates.requirement: public preset work remains the top non-depth mechanism lane
gates.observed: top lane seed-table-preset-probe; top status ready
gates.promotion_rule: mechanism ranking keeps a public preset lane ahead of raw-depth escalation

gates.requirement: canonical seed-table v0 changes the selected-span distribution
gates.observed: 37768 selected spans; best delta -1671 bytes; beats sha256 True
gates.promotion_rule: selected spans exist and beat the SHA-256 baseline

gates.requirement: decoder-public dictionary presets improve held-out rows
gates.observed: 20239 standards selected spans; 9 ordinary negative groups; best delta -8262 bytes
gates.promotion_rule: standards dictionary beats SHA-256 and generic dictionary baselines

gates.requirement: wins are distributed across unrelated ordinary held-out families
gates.observed: schema standards ordinary groups 9; canonical ordinary groups 0
gates.promotion_rule: at least three ordinary held-out negative groups

gates.requirement: paired shadow, binary, random, and control dictionaries remain null
gates.observed: standards control groups 2; canonical control groups 0; schema claim control_failed_on_frozen_expansion_corpora

gates.requirement: preset signal is not explained by equivalent hash trials or salted expanders
gates.observed: seed-table SHA-256 selected 0; schema SHA-256 selected 0; salt selected rows 0
gates.promotion_rule: SHA-256 and salted-expander baselines remain null

gates.requirement: public preset evidence decodes exactly and rejects corrupt inputs
gates.observed: all exact decode True; all corrupt rejections True; discovery exact decode True
gates.promotion_rule: all promoted rows decode exactly and reject corruption

gates.requirement: format metadata is allowed only after search-frontier promotion opens
gates.observed: format promotion allowed False; broad depth search allowed False

agent_audit_briefs.mission: design stronger paired controls and disjoint held-out families for public presets
forbidden_actions: No Seed Search: do not run new broad seed sweeps
do not count shadow-control wins as natural-corpus proof

agent_audit_briefs.mission: draft preset registry requirements only after promotion gates pass
forbidden_actions: do not add .tlmr format support while format-promotion-boundary is blocked
do not weaken v1/v2 compatibility guarantees

agent_audit_briefs.mission: compare preset wins against equivalent random-trial and metadata budgets
forbidden_actions: do not reopen raw depth search from public-preset signal alone
do not ignore preset ID, registry, or compatibility bytes
